brief: Senator Lindsey Graham's sudden death dominates US politics, while a Bangkok bar fire kills at least 27 and wildfires in Spain injure a British couple. Research highlights include AI-assisted crime linkage and brain-computer interface trials in China.
news_summary: Lindsey Graham dies from a sudden illness, triggering a special election in South Carolina and sparking debate on congressional age. A Bangkok pub fire kills 27, and a British couple is badly burned in Spanish wildfires.
papers_summary: Papers explore AI in high-stakes crime linkage analysis and clinical translation of brain-computer interfaces in China, alongside visual analytics for missing data and sign language recognition.

en.brief: Senator Lindsey Graham's sudden death dominates US politics, while a Bangkok bar fire kills at least 27 and wildfires in Spain injure a British couple. Research highlights include AI-assisted crime linkage and brain-computer interface trials in China.
en.news_summary: Lindsey Graham dies from a sudden illness, triggering a special election in South Carolina and sparking debate on congressional age. A Bangkok pub fire kills 27, and a British couple is badly burned in Spanish wildfires.
en.papers_summary: Papers explore AI in high-stakes crime linkage analysis and clinical translation of brain-computer interfaces in China, alongside visual analytics for missing data and sign language recognition.

zh.brief: 浙江连续遭遇台风侵袭，近200万人疏散；韩国寺庙举办静修相亲活动助单身男女寻找爱情。学术方面无中文论文，但国际研究关注可视化分析与AI应用。
zh.news_summary: 台风巴威两度登陆浙江，当地提前一周转移人员、加固设施，近200万人疏散。韩国僧侣组织30小时山林静修相亲，帮助单身男女解决恋爱难题。
zh.papers_summary: 今日无中文论文，但国际学术研究涉及缺失数据可视化、AI在犯罪关联分析中的应用及中国传统绘画构图分析等。

todays_image.caption: The "HIBERNIA" fire engine plate suggests a dormant emergency, mirroring Lindsey Graham's suddenly uncertain re-election path.
todays_image.title: Fire Engine Plate, "HIBERNIA"
